componentInstanceProperties.name: htmlValue
componentInstanceProperties.value: We're thrilled to share the latest updates with our colleagues at Moving Intelligence! Keep reading for more information, insights and other exciting subjects!

componentInstanceProperties.name: htmlValue
componentInstanceProperties.value:
Good News!

The production problems have been resolved for both the Mi01/04 and the Mi40/50. There is currently enough stock to meet the need now and in the following months.

componentInstanceProperties.name: htmlValue
componentInstanceProperties.value:
Product development

Bluetooth: We completed a successful internal test of our newly developed Bluetooth Emergency Unlock feature. Based on the positive feedback we will proceed with our plans for this new feature and start updating the firmware for customers to make sure they can use the emergency unlock once released. The definitive introduction date will be decided shortly so we can prepare all customer communication and plan an app release. This app release will give customers access to this new feature and will save their day if they need to use it!

We also started working on the Mi50 Service Mask. The service mask will configure the Mi50 based on its active services. This will be implemented in multiple phases. The first phase will be primarily about Mi-block behavior.

componentInstanceProperties.name: htmlValue
componentInstanceProperties.value:
Hardware development

Main focus on different homologation tests. At this moment we wait for the final result of the European CE test and then we start the SCM and INCERT homologation procedure.

Problems have arisen with the small emergency contact of the immobilizer from supplier Laserline. The decision has been made to go back to the large emergency key and ignition.

componentInstanceProperties.name: htmlValue
componentInstanceProperties.value:
Total Active Subscriptions

MiDE -   18.748
MiUK -   22.993
MiNL - 107.016

Total - 148.757
Note: The numbers contain all platforms.

componentInstanceProperties.name: richTextValue
componentInstanceProperties.value:
Mi Get Connected: EuropeTrack solutions by Thijs

On September 19, 2023, Thijs led an engaging introduction to the EuropeTrack platform as part of our "Mi Get Connected" series. The session was a hit, drawing over 50 attendees and featuring a compelling showcase of EuropeTrack's solutions. Thijs' presentation offered valuable insights and was well-received by the team.

componentInstanceProperties.name: htmlValue
componentInstanceProperties.value: <hr style="height: 2px; background-color: #e20030; margin-top: 8px; margin-bottom: 23px; width:100%;border: none;">

componentInstanceProperties.name: richTextValue
componentInstanceProperties.value:
It is Showtime in the UK!

The Caravan, Camping, and Motorhome Show in the UK has become a whirlwind of excitement and learning. Last year, it drew an astounding 101,606 visitors at Birmingham's National Exhibition Centre, setting a new record. The event is a grand display of the latest in caravans, motorhomes, campervans, tents, awnings, and even luxurious holiday lodges.

Surprisingly, 86 percent of ticket buyers were first-time attendees, adding a fresh wave of enthusiasm to the show. Given the unfortunate surge in leisure vehicle thefts, insurance premiums have risen in 2022 and 2023, making this exhibition an ideal platform to showcase our security products.

This colossal event spans 24 halls, each brimming with new caravans, motorhomes, and an array of accessories for your vehicles. It's an event of monumental proportions, to say the least. This year, we're thrilled to have Dan Trudgian from the caravan enthusiast platform "The Trudgians" join our stand. His contagious passion for caravans is bound to resonate with visitors.

Dan will be engaging with customers, promoting our products, and sharing his wealth of knowledge. We'll also be present at the Caravan Writers Guild dinner, a gathering of journalists who specialize in covering the industry. It's an excellent forum to connect with the public, as well as dealers and manufacturers.

Our tracking systems are already featured as add-ons to new caravans and trailer tents in the exhibition halls. The aim is to keep people informed, pique interest, gather valuable data, and most importantly, instill confidence that their investments are secure with us. We're eagerly anticipating the opportunity to make a meaningful impact at this event.

componentInstanceProperties.name: richTextValue
componentInstanceProperties.value:
Celebrating a Decade of Excellence: Aileen Arndt's and Arndt Bachmanns 10-Year Milestones

Aileen, our esteemed HR and Administration Manager, and Arndt, our highly experienced Enterprise Sales Account Manager, have been the backbone of our organization over the past ten years. While Aileen has been instrumental in shaping our corporate culture, Arndt has brought us many clients over the years. On the occasion of this milestone, we would like to express our heartfelt thanks to Aileen and Arndt for their tireless commitment and contribution to our success. Here's to many more years of collaboration, growth and excellence!

componentInstanceProperties.name: htmlValue
componentInstanceProperties.value: <hr style="height: 2px; background-color: #e20030; margin-top: 8px; margin-bottom: 23px; width:100%;border: none;">

componentInstanceProperties.name: richTextValue
componentInstanceProperties.value:
The B2Run with the german colleagues

What an exhilarating experience we had at the B2Run event on September 27, 2023! The atmosphere was electric from the moment we gathered at the starting line, filled with heart-pounding anticipation. With professional timing and hydration stations, the race was both fun and competitive. The sense of collective pride as we crossed the finish line in Berlin's iconic Olympic Stadium was unforgettable, heightened by the post-race refreshments and finisher medals. Adding to the significance of our participation, the event was climate-neutral and even included a tree-planting initiative. The 5.4km distance made it inclusive for all, and the camaraderie we felt was the real victory of the day. Thank you to everyone who contributed to making this a memorable team experience. Here's to many more adventures together!

componentInstanceProperties.name: htmlValue
componentInstanceProperties.value:
Marketing-News!

The marketing colleagues are teaming up more and more. We launched the first social post (theft post) on the same day in all three countries. New cool things are coming: The new brand identity book will be released in Q4. We will also release a redesign of the Mi website in NL, Germany will follow in Q1 2024. The UK team is busy with the preparation of the biggest Camper exhibition of the year mid October. The DE team adapted all Mi04 campaign materials. And in NL we launched the Track & Trace whitepaper to collect leads. All teams are focused to boost the business this last quarter of the year.

componentInstanceProperties.name: htmlValue
componentInstanceProperties.value:
We would like to welcome all of our new colleagues to the Mi Team and introduce them to you!

We're also very thrilled to welcome our new Group CTO, who brings a wealth of expertise and innovation to our technology initiatives.

componentInstanceProperties.name: htmlValue
componentInstanceProperties.value:
Mi Group | Evert Geurtsen
Chief Technology Officer

Evert Geurtsen joins Moving Intelligence as the new Group CTO on October 2nd. With over 20 years in executive roles, mainly in the machine building industry, Evert specializes in leveraging digital technologies to create value-added products. He's a down-to-earth leader who values collaboration and has a good sense of humor. Outside of work, he enjoys family time and outdoor activities. Evert is eager to meet the team and contribute to our success.

componentInstanceProperties.name: htmlValue
componentInstanceProperties.value: <hr style="height: 2px; background-color: #e20030; margin-top: 8px; margin-bottom: 23px; width:100%;border: none;">

componentInstanceProperties.name: htmlValue
componentInstanceProperties.value: Meet MiNL

componentInstanceProperties.name: htmlValue
componentInstanceProperties.value:
MiNL | Kitty Hölzken
Financial Management Assistant

My name is Kitty Holzken I was born and raised in Den Bosch. I am 57 years old and have two children and two grandchildren. Since August 14, 2023, he has been working at Moving Itelligence in Zaltbommel as a financial management assistant. So not for much longer. My hobbies are cycling, mountain biking, yoga and running.

componentInstanceProperties.name: htmlValue
componentInstanceProperties.value:
MiNL | Daan Goes
Intern at administration department

I am a recent addition to the administration department, there I make invoices for England and handle the incoming mails. In my free time I like to play computer games, think of Skyrim and Kingdom come deliverance. When the finances are available I collect, build and paint Warhammer 40k miniatures.

componentInstanceProperties.name: htmlValue
componentInstanceProperties.value: <hr style="height: 2px; background-color: #e20030; margin-top: 8px; margin-bottom: 23px; width:100%;border: none;">

componentInstanceProperties.name: htmlValue
componentInstanceProperties.value: Meet MiUK

componentInstanceProperties.name: htmlValue
componentInstanceProperties.value:
MiUK | Francesca Middleton
Business Development Manager

Francesca joins us as a business development manager for the south, working in leisure, construction and fleet. In her short time with us she has been out in the market building strong industry relationships and developing new business channels. A keen sales professional during her free time she likes to play cricket to let off some steam. Time spent with family and friends are of great value to Francesca and we welcome her into our family here at Moving Intelligence

componentInstanceProperties.name: htmlValue
componentInstanceProperties.value:
MiUK | Katy Bramhall
Customer support

I started the company back in July as a customer support agent. I didn't know anything about the tracking side of things when I first started but I am slowly learning the role and enjoying it in the process. A bit about myself. I live in the countryside with my Fiancé and 2 cats their names are Tinkerbell and Dozer. I love spending time with my nieces and nephews in my spare time. Going to Bingo every Thursday with my family and baking.

componentInstanceProperties.name: htmlValue
componentInstanceProperties.value:
MiUK | David Wilson-Sanders
Business Development Manager

I am part of the Business Development team for Moving Intelligence on the construction side and have over 15 year’s experience within the tracking industry. I live in Leeds and have 2 children my daughter is 16 and my son who’s 11 and a dog called Buddy. I enjoy spending as much time as possible with them, however my daughter would say I cramp her style. I enjoy watching football and watching my son play for our local rugby team, I enjoy travelling and would say I am a bit of a foody as I love cooking and eating.

componentInstanceProperties.name: htmlValue
componentInstanceProperties.value:
MiUK | Jake Gurbut
Dispatch Team

Jake is part of our dispatch team, ensuring that all orders are fulfilled, packed and shipped correctly. As well as this he also programs the alarms, activates our trackers and ensures the shelves are always full so our items are always ready to be purchased. Jake lives in Stockport with his parents and younger brother, in his spare time he watches Manchester United's depressing attempt of Football.

componentInstanceProperties.name: htmlValue
componentInstanceProperties.value:
MiUK | Moses Butterworth
Business Development Manager

Hi my name Moses, I have recently joined Moving Intelligence working as an internal cross external Business development manager. My focus within MI is bringing in new and managing existing customer accounts through B2B Construction sales. With nearly 2 years of experience behind me, the step to join Moving Intelligence was one I was able to take with both hands, watching a large company get bigger and bigger every day, and furthermore being a part of it is a feeling that I feel is second to none. I am looking forward to the lessons I have still to learn here at MI, and also applying these lessons to teach and guide my future colleagues along their journey.

componentInstanceProperties.name: htmlValue
componentInstanceProperties.value: ​​​

properties.name: preheader
properties.value: We're thrilled to share the latest updates with our colleagues at Moving Intelligence!
